The monitoring plan computes PSI weekly for key numerical and categorical features.
It was a monthly‑accuracy‑only monitoring plan that checked model accuracy once per month.

PSI was added so the monitoring plan can compute it weekly for key features, letting the team detect feature drift early and automatically trigger retraining when PSI exceeds the alert threshold for two consecutive checks.

The policy now allows read‑only shell commands to run automatically, but any write or delete commands must be approved by the user (unrestricted automatic shell commands are no longer allowed).
